Class IsabelleProgressModel

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.table.AbstractTableModel
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.gui.IsabelleProgressModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, TableModel
public class IsabelleProgressModel extends AbstractTableModel
Encapsulates the table of progress bars that is shown within the progress dialog: For each solver and each goal there is a cell.
See Also:
